raw_text: al nofuentes martínez personal and contact information name: silvia surname: nofuentes martínez nationality: spanish date of birth: 19 of july 1992 address: azagador 41, madrid, spain contact: +34650038133 a e-mail: silvianm190 gmail.com ur professional experience 01.2016-04.2016 co-founder of project nebaqua. participating at airbus bizlab aerospace business accelerator program. hamburg, germany. - developing a conceptual prototype of our project, a water separation and evaporation system based on ultrasonic nebulization. - working in the business model for creating a start-up. - coaching from airbus experts in different fields (business, aircraft water system, environmental affairs, ground operations...). - sharing experiences and an international work environment with other 5 start-ups selected between 100 applicants worldwide. 02.2015-05.2015 internship as process engineer. (tp group (industria de turbo-propulsores). madrid, spain. - definition of the itp external processes for the fabrication of aircraft engine pipe components. - support with the planning and delivery of the orders, education 12.2014 airbus course of design for aircraft manufacturing. technical university of madrid. madrid, spain. 09.2010-07.2015 bachelor degree in aerospace engineering technical university of madrid. madrid, spain. specialized in aerospace propulsion. degree thesis: preliminary studies for the selection of a turbofan able to propel civil aircraft, silvia nofuentes martínez nofuentes martinez additionals languages spanish: mother tongue. english: toefl ibt certificate (87/120) in may 2015. german: currently studying (level b1.1). french: medium-low level (studied for four years). italian: level a2. international starting an aeronautical master at the technical university of milan. experience left it to move to hamburg to join airbus bizlab and work in nebaqua project, after 4 months living in milan. specialized in aerospace propulsion. milan, italy. english summer course in canada in july 2007. receiving private lessons and living with a foster family. london, canada. french secondary school exchange in 2007 of two weeks. villebon-sur-yvette, france. training participating in airbus competition fly your ideas (round 2) with icebus team. madrid, spain. worldwide competition for university students to present and develop aeronautic ideas and projects. icebus proposal was to reduce aircraft weight during flights by evaporating and taking out the water present on the waste-water system, tutoring mathematics, chemistry and physics private tutor of secondary schoo} students from 2012 to 2015. madrid, spain. software skills ms office: word, excel and powerpoint catia v5 (basic level). hobbies joining an athletics training club and competing all over spain from 2004 to 2009. others driving license class b since 2011.
